questions.subject: Current Affairs
questions.prompt: The 'Likaru-Mig La-Fukche' axis, recently in the news, is strategically significant primarily because it:

options.text: Provides an alternative route to the Siachen Glacier from the Nubra Valley.
Connects the Changthang Plateau to the Fukche airfield near the Line of Actual Control.
Facilitates all-weather connectivity between the Kashmir Valley and the Leh region.
Forms the primary supply line for the Daulat Beg Oldie (DBO) sector in Northern Ladakh.

questions.explanation: The road at Mig La Pass forms a critical link in the Likaru-Mig La-Fukche axis. This axis is vital because it connects the high-altitude Changthang Plateau to the Fukche airfield, which is situated near the Line of Actual Control (LAC) with China.
questions.takeaway: The Likaru-Mig La-Fukche axis is a strategic link connecting Ladakh's interior plateaus to forward airfields near the LAC.
questions.evidenceExcerpt: Road forms a critical link in the Likaru-Mig La-Fukche axis, connecting to the Fukche airfield near Line of Actual Control with China. Mig La Pass is located on the Changthang Plateau in Ladakh.

questions.subject: Geography
questions.prompt: The Mig La Pass, which recently saw the completion of the world's highest motorable road, is geographically situated in which of the following regions?

options.text: The Zanskar Range in Western Ladakh
The Changthang Plateau in Eastern Ladakh
The Pir Panjal Range in Jammu and Kashmir
The Doklam Plateau near the Tri-junction

questions.explanation: Mig La Pass is located on the Changthang Plateau in Ladakh. This plateau is known for its high-altitude landscape and strategic proximity to the Line of Actual Control (LAC).
questions.takeaway: Mig La Pass is a key geographical feature of the Changthang Plateau, distinct from the Zanskar or Pir Panjal ranges.
questions.evidenceExcerpt: Mig La Pass is located on the Changthang Plateau in Ladakh.

questions.subject: Current Affairs
questions.prompt: In the context of India's border infrastructure, the 'Likaru-Mig La-Fukche' axis is strategically vital primarily because it:

options.text: Provides an alternative all-weather route to the Siachen Glacier bypassing the Khardung La.
Connects the hinterland of Ladakh directly to the Fukche airfield near the Line of Actual Control.
Serves as the primary logistics corridor for the development of the Shinku La tunnel.
Facilitates the movement of heavy artillery from the Kashmir Valley to the Daulat Beg Oldie (DBO) sector.

questions.explanation: The Likaru-Mig La-Fukche axis is a critical strategic link that connects to the Fukche airfield, which is located very close to the Line of Actual Control (LAC) with China, thereby enhancing rapid deployment capabilities.
questions.takeaway: The Likaru-Mig La-Fukche axis is specifically designed to enhance connectivity to the Fukche airfield near the LAC.
questions.evidenceExcerpt: Road forms a critical link in the Likaru-Mig La-Fukche axis, connecting to the Fukche airfield near Line of Actual Control with China.
